center.name: 巴厘省
center.summary: 巴厘省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括白鹈鹕、Javan owlet、Pink-headed fruit dove等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: limbata is found in Bali and the Lesser Sundas, and L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The cerulean kingfisher is native to Sumatra, Java, the Kangean Islands, Bali, Lombok and Sumbawa, all in Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The flame-fronted barbet (Psilopogon armillaris) is an Asian barbet native to Java and Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the mountains of eastern Java, Bali, Timor and Alor Island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the islands of Java and Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It was found in most of Java and Bali (but has been potentially extirpated from there since the mid-2010s) and formerly in southern Sumatra (where it is known to have become extinct in the area since the 1990s). Due to mass collection for the illegal wildlife trade and heavy pesticide use in the agricultural lands it used for feeding, it is now feared to be extinct in the wild.{{cite book|author1=Ali, S |author2=S D Ripley |name-list-style=amp | title=Handbook of the birds of India and Pakistan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pink-headed fruit dove is a resident breeding endemic bird in Indonesia where it occurs in the mountain forests of Sumatra, Java and Bali at altitudes of 1000–2200 m

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Java and Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Greater Sundas, but it does not inhabit Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nisoriaBali, Indonesia | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Lonchura | species = punctulata | authority = (Linnaeus, 1758) | range_map = Areale Lonchura punctulata.jpg | range_map_alt = Native range | range_map_caption = Native range | synonyms = *Loxia punctulata }} The scaly-breasted munia or spotted munia (Lonchura punctulata), known in the pet trade as nutmeg mannikin or spice finch, is a sparrow-sized estrildid finch native to tropical Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to Java and Bali in Indonesia, where its population has declined significantly due to excessive trapping for the cage-bird trade

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crescent-chested babbler (Cyanoderma melanothorax) is a babbler species in the family Timaliidae and is native to the Indonesian islands of Java and Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in eastern Java, southern Sulawesi, Bali and on the Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-capped munia (Lonchura ferruginosa) is a species of estrildid finch found in Java and Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Bali and Java

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pelicans arrive in the Danube in late March or early April and depart after breeding from September to late November. Wintering locations for European pelicans are not exactly known but wintering birds may occur in northeastern Africa through Iraq to north India, with a particularly large number of breeders from Asia wintering around Pakistan and Sri Lanka. Northern populations migrate to China, India, Myanmar, with stragglers reaching Java and Bali in Indonesia. These are birds that are found mostly in lowlands, though in East Africa and Nepal may be found living at elevations of up to . Overall, the great white pelican is one of the most widely distributed species

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This bird occurs in southern Burma (Myanmar), Thailand, Indo-China, Sumatra, Java and Bali in scrub and secondary growth, open fields and gardens, bamboo thickets and open forest often near villages

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It mainly inhabits the islands of Java and Bali. A few individuals have been reported on Lombok and Sumatra islands, and in Southeastern Borneo. It mostly inhabits open woodlands, gardens and mangroves. This bird's presence has also been reported on the seacoast and in the lowlands of Sumatra Island. It is found between the sea level and up to a maximum of 600 meters in altitude. Many tourists travel to the region of Taro on the island of Bali to observe this bird.{{Cite journal|last=Ginantra, Darmadi, Gari, Sudirga|first=I Ketut, A.A

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Java and Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-eared barbet (Psilopogon australis) is an Asian barbet native to Java and Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Javan munia (Lonchura leucogastroides) is a species of estrildid finch native to southern Sumatra, Java, Bali and Lombok islands in Indonesia
